features: 【Versatile Functionality】These adhesive hooks are perfect for a wide range of uses, including hanging fabric banners, Christmas bells, posters, flyers, popular advertising paper, balloons, bead curtains, small flags, and more. Ideal for lightweight items, these ceiling hooks are not designed for heavy objects. Whether you're decorating for a party or organizing your space, these adhesive ceiling hooks provide a practical solution for all your ceiling decorations hanging needs.

【Effortless Installation】Our ceiling hooks adhesive are incredibly easy to use. Simply remove the protective film and stick the hook onto a clean, smooth surface, then press to exhaust the internal air. No drilling or damage to your ceiling is required. These small adhesive hooks can be applied to metal, glass, tile, wood, marble, and other smooth surfaces, making them a versatile choice for any room.

【High-Quality Materials】Made from premium plastic and iron, these hooks clear are both durable and aesthetically pleasing. The clear adhesive hooks blend seamlessly with any decor, providing a non-marking, transparent, and beautiful solution for your hanging needs. These drill free adhesive hooks are designed to hold firmly while maintaining the integrity of your surfaces.

【Comprehensive Package】 Each package includes 20pcs non-marking ceiling discs and 20pcs metal hooks, ensuring you have plenty of sticky hooks for hanging all your decorations and organizational items. The clear ceiling hook design ensures that your hooks remain discreet and unobtrusive, allowing your decorations to take center stage.

【Wide Range of Applications】These hooks for ceiling are perfect for a variety of occasions and settings. Use them for festival, birthday, party, weddings, Christmas, Valentine's Day, Easter, Halloween decorations, or even in apartments, coffee shops, bazaars, and shopping malls. The ceiling hooks for hanging are versatile enough to meet all your decorative and organizational needs, making them an essential tool for any event or space.
